title: pastinaca pumila
intro: Pastinaca pumila, also known as the small or dwarf parsnip, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and is also used to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Pastinaca pumila include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
